overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the Temple of Poseidon at night, circling a monumental bronze statue, then descending to the coastal village of Heraklion to explore a fish market and building interior. The scene features ancient Greek architecture, torchlit pathways, and Mediterranean coastal views under a moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered temple walkway with wooden pergola

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered temple walkway toward the open courtyard ahead

notable_agents.action: temple visitor walking ahead toward the courtyard

entered.detail: wooden beam ceiling with climbing vines providing partial cover
patterned stone tile flooring with geometric designs
thick wooden posts supporting the pergola structure
metal brazier with burning fire providing warm light
stone steps leading up to the main temple courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered walkway with a wooden pergola roof and stone tile flooring. Torchlight illuminates the path as the character approaches the stairs leading to the open temple courtyard, following other visitors ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with monumental Poseidon statue

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open temple courtyard
character begins circling the Poseidon statue and looking upward at the trident

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the large bronze Poseidon statue, examining it from multiple angles while looking up at the trident

notable_agents.action: temple visitor standing near the statue base observing the monument

entered.detail: massive bronze statue of Poseidon holding a trident atop a stone pedestal
classical Greek temple facade with columns and pediment
tall dark cypress trees framing the courtyard
burning braziers at the base of the statue providing firelight

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast moonlit courtyard dominated by a colossal bronze Poseidon statue. The character circles the monument, looking up at the trident silhouetted against the night sky, while the classical temple facade looms on the left and torchlight flickers at the statue's base.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path descending from temple to village

events.description: location name changes from Temple of Poseidon to Heraklion, entering the coastal village area

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloping coastal path from the temple toward the village of Heraklion

entered.detail: winding stone and dirt path leading downhill toward the coast
cluster of stone houses with tiled roofs in the coastal village
tall stone columns marking the entrance to the village area
moonlit view of the bay and distant coastline

segments.scene_description: Leaving the temple courtyard behind, the character descends a winding coastal path toward the village of Heraklion. Stone gateway pillars mark the transition to the village area, with the moonlit Mediterranean bay visible in the distance and stone cottages clustered along the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: village fish market and residential interior

events.description: enters the fish market building from the village street, transitioning from outdoor to indoor
exits the building back to the outdoor coastal area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking past the fish market stall with hanging catch, entering the stone building, and exploring the interior rooms with wooden furniture and rugs

entered.detail: wooden market stall with hanging fish and seafood displays
large fish and meat cuts hanging from wooden beams
stone-walled room with wooden ceiling beams and simple furnishings
rustic wooden shelving unit with baskets and goods
colorful patterned rugs covering the stone floor
palm tree visible when exiting back to the coastal exterior

segments.scene_description: The character explores the village fish market with cured fish hanging from wooden beams, then enters a stone cottage. Inside, the dimly lit interior features wooden shelves, woven rugs, and simple furniture. After exploring the rooms, the character exits back to the coastal exterior where palm trees frame the view of the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the torchlit corridors of a sacred temple down into the moonlit coastal village of Heraklion. It begins within a covered walkway under a wooden pergola, moving along stone tiles as the character follows other visitors toward a set of stairs. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast courtyard dominated by a colossal bronze statue of Poseidon silhouetted against the night sky. The camera then leaves the temple behind, descending a winding coastal path through stone gateway pillars as the Mediterranean bay comes into view. Finally, the movement shifts from the open hillside into the village fish market and the dimly lit interior of a stone cottage before exiting once more to a view of the bay framed by palm trees.
